student_modification: The vectorized RBF kernel formula was adapted from an LLM suggestion. I modified the scaling constant from gamma to gamma/2 to match Equation (4) of the paper, and restructured the function to handle arbitrary batch sizes. The surrounding empirical_expected_kernel and build_kernel_matrix functions were written independently.

interactions.prompt: How do I use sklearn SVC with a precomputed kernel matrix?
interactions.purpose: Debugging the kernel='precomputed' API — the test matrix shape requirement was unclear
interactions.note: The fix (transposing K_test to shape n_test x n_train) was discovered by reading sklearn documentation after the prompt.

interactions.prompt: Show me how to compute the RBF kernel matrix between two sets of vectors X and Z efficiently in numpy.
interactions.student_mod: Adapted the vectorized formula; added the gamma/2 scaling to match Eq.(4) in the paper.

interactions.prompt: What is the correct shape of the test kernel matrix when using kernel='precomputed' in sklearn SVC?
interactions.purpose: Debugging shape mismatch error during predict()
